clusters.justification: These terms share a latent axis of emotional valence, arousal, and mood processing that strongly relies on macroscopic limbic and salience network structures.
This axis represents the computation of incentive salience, subjective utility, and goal-directed appraisal subserved by the meso-corticolimbic circuitry.
This cluster binds internally generated representations of the self and others, reflecting a continuum of social and self-referential processing that robustly co-activates the default mode network.
